title: Nameless Trinkets
description: Add powerful trinkets, whick you will find when exploring the world.
body: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/735938861636780042?style=flat-square&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/2wMZKZ7B6E) • [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-Ko--fi-F16061?style=flat-square&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/cozary) • [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Cozary/Nameless-Trinkets?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white&color=364763)](https://github.com/Cozary/Nameless-Trinkets/issues) • [![Crowdin](https://badges.crowdin.net/nameless-trinkets/localized.svg)](https://crowdin.com/project/nameless-trinkets) ![](https://i.imgur.com/1lib5AY.png)__**About**__ -------------------------------------------------   Looking for a mod that adds powerful trinkets? This mod adds a wide variety of trinkets to the game, each one with a different ability that will be effective depending on the situation or the way you play.   ![](https://i.imgur.com/FHlewK2.png)   Trinkets can be found when exploring the world in structure-spawned chests! Or you can craft them yourself! ![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/M6fEiWDG1m1Mjgpri4/giphy.gif)   The ability that trinkets provide you can be seen by pressing Shift on the item. There are at least +25 trinkets with unique abilities! What are you waiting to find them all?  ![](https://i.imgur.com/OT2aoh8.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/Hr7S7mp.png)   Some trinkets are based on The Binding Of Isaac, a great game. This is due to a previous project of mine where I wanted to introduce the trinkets of said game.    ![](https://i.imgur.com/1lib5AY.png)__**Support Me**__ -------------------------------------------------------     I do this as a hobby but it still consumes some of my time. So if you really like what I do and want to support me you can do it here. [![Server Parnertship Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=809)
